Preconditions: Backend and frontend are running; user account exists
Steps: 1. Open app; 2. Sign in; 3. Wait for Home
Expected Result: Home loads with pet list or empty state; no crash

Steps: 1. Tap Add Pet; 2. Fill name/species/age/gender; 3. Save
Expected Result: Pet appears on Home and can be opened from View Profile

Preconditions: User has at least one pet
Steps: 1. On Home, tap Care records & reminders on pet card
Expected Result: Core care screen opens for selected pet

Scenario: Open care records from Pet Profile
Preconditions: User has at least one pet
Steps: 1. Open pet profile; 2. Tap Care records & reminders
Expected Result: Core care screen opens; pet name is shown

Steps: 1. Select Diary; 2. Enter title and note; 3. Tap Save record
Expected Result: Record appears in Recent records; Diary counter increases

Steps: 1. Select Diary; 2. Leave title blank; 3. Add note; 4. Save
Expected Result: Record is saved with default diary title

Steps: 1. Select Reminder; 2. Add title/note; 3. Enter due date like 2026-06-20; 4. Save
Expected Result: Reminder appears in Upcoming reminders and Recent records; pending reminders counter increases

Preconditions: At least one pending reminder exists
Steps: 1. Tap Mark done on reminder
Expected Result: Reminder disappears from Upcoming reminders or no longer counted as pending

Steps: 1. Select Reminder; 2. Add title/note; 3. Leave due date blank; 4. Save
Expected Result: Reminder is saved; UI shows No due date

Steps: 1. Select Vet visit; 2. Add clinic/diagnosis/treatment details in note; 3. Save
Expected Result: Vet visit record appears in Recent records with correct type

Steps: 1. Select Document; 2. Add title and link/note to vaccine book or invoice; 3. Save
Expected Result: Document record appears; Documents counter increases

Steps: 1. Pull down to refresh
Expected Result: Records reload without duplication or crash

Preconditions: At least one care record exists; Supabase schema is applied
Steps: 1. Close/reopen app or refresh web; 2. Log in; 3. Open same pet care screen
Expected Result: Previously saved records are still visible

Scenario: Pet A records do not show for Pet B
Preconditions: User has at least two pets; Pet A has records
Steps: 1. Open Pet B care screen
Expected Result: Pet A records are not visible for Pet B

Steps: 1. Scroll to Free care library; 2. Read each card
Expected Result: Emergency, vaccines, nutrition, and grooming cards render without AI calls

Scenario: View credit card in care screen
Steps: 1. Open Core Care; 2. Scroll to AI credits section
Expected Result: Credit balance is shown or unavailable fallback is shown; free care still usable

Preconditions: User is logged in; daily cap not reached
Steps: 1. Open Core Care; 2. Tap Earn 1 credit with rewarded ad
Expected Result: Success alert appears; credit balance increases by 1
Notes: Ad is placeholder; verify API behavior

Preconditions: User can claim ad credit repeatedly in test env
Steps: 1. Claim rewarded ad credit until cap; 2. Claim one more time
Expected Result: App shows daily cap error; no extra credit is added

Steps: 1. Refresh Core Care; 2. Check AI credits section
Expected Result: Last credit event shows ad_reward or a recent ledger reason

Scenario: New user starts with limited trial credits
Preconditions: Create or use a fresh user after schema update
Steps: 1. Login; 2. Open Core Care or health screen
Expected Result: Initial AI credits should be 2; monthly allowance should be 0

Preconditions: User has at least 1 credit; valid pet/photo
Steps: 1. Open Health Check; 2. Upload valid photo; 3. Submit
Expected Result: Analysis succeeds; credit balance decreases by health cost

Preconditions: User has at least 1 credit; dog/cat pet; required photos ready
Steps: 1. Open Breed Recognition; 2. Upload face/eyes/coat; 3. Submit
Expected Result: Result succeeds; credit balance decreases by breed cost

Steps: 1. Open health or breed screen
Expected Result: UI indicates out of credits; backend rejects AI call with AI_CREDITS_EXHAUSTED

Scenario: Free care still works with 0 credits
Steps: 1. Open Core Care; 2. Add diary/reminder/document
Expected Result: Records save successfully; no AI credit required

Preconditions: Health check screen; two identical images available
Steps: 1. Upload same image as primary and extra; 2. Submit
Expected Result: Request fails before AI; no credit consumed; user sees validation/failure message

Preconditions: Prepare non-image or unsupported file if platform allows
Steps: 1. Try uploading unsupported file; 2. Submit
Expected Result: Request is rejected before AI; no credit consumed

Steps: 1. Enter weight over 200 or invalid text; 2. Submit with photo
Expected Result: Request is rejected before AI; no credit consumed

Preconditions: Breed recognition screen; same image in required slots
Steps: 1. Upload same photo for face and eyes; 2. Submit
Expected Result: Request fails before AI; no credit consumed

Scenario: History translation does not repeat cached translations
Preconditions: User has English analysis and Vietnamese UI
Steps: 1. Open history/profile in Vietnamese; 2. Let translation run; 3. Reopen same history
Expected Result: Already translated records are reused; no repeated translation for cached rows

Preconditions: Set low AI_GLOBAL_DAILY_BUDGET_USD in backend env; restart backend
Steps: 1. Run AI call until projected spend exceeds budget; 2. Try another AI action
Expected Result: Backend returns AI_APP_BUDGET_EXHAUSTED; UI shows free AI capacity used message

Steps: 1. Use health scan until budget exhausted; 2. Try breed recognition
Expected Result: Health is blocked by feature budget; other features may still work if budgets allow

Steps: 1. Call GET /api/v1/admin/ai-ops-summary with x-admin-secret
Expected Result: Returns daily/monthly spend, remaining budget, feature usage

Steps: 1. Create pet/care record/claim ad; 2. Call GET /api/v1/admin/product-analytics-summary
Expected Result: Returns event counts including pet_created and core_care_* events

Steps: 1. Call /api/v1/core-care/pets/{petId}/records without Authorization
Expected Result: Request returns unauthorized; no records leaked

Scenario: Cannot access another user's pet records
Steps: 1. User A creates record; 2. User B calls User A pet records endpoint
Expected Result: Request returns Pet not found or empty; no data leak

Steps: 1. Run updated supabase-schema.sql; 2. Verify tables exist
Expected Result: ai_credit_accounts, ai_usage_events, ai_credit_ledger, pet_care_records, app_events exist with RLS

Steps: 1. Tap Scan Health; 2. Back; 3. Tap View Profile
Expected Result: Existing navigation still works

Scenario: Onboarding reminders CTA opens core care
Preconditions: New user onboarding flow reaches services prompt
Steps: 1. Tap manage vaccines/reminders CTA
Expected Result: Core care opens instead of AI health check

Steps: 1. View Home/Profile/Core Care in English and Vietnamese
Expected Result: No missing translation keys are visible

Scenario: Core care layout on small screen
Steps: 1. Open Core Care; 2. Scroll entire screen; 3. Add record
Expected Result: Layout is usable; keyboard does not block save flow
